items.title_en: Trump attack defendant Cole Allen under harsher jail conditions than Jan. 6 defendants: judge

items.desc_en: Cole Allen is charged with trying to assassinate President Donald Trump at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner at the Washington Hilton Hotel.

items.title_en: Berkshire analysts are still tepid on the stock after annual meeting. What Abel can do to win them over

items.desc_en: "We think investors were hoping for a more aggressive buyback stance," said Catherine Seifert, analyst at CFRA.

items.title_en: Spain seizes record amount of cocaine in Atlantic Ocean, authorities say

items.desc_en: The Civil Guard found between 30,000 and 45,000kg of the drug on a freighter headed to Libya.
items.desc_zh: 国民警卫队在一艘开往利比亚的货轮上发现了 30,000 至 45,000 公斤毒品。

items.title_en: Novo Nordisk’s Wegovy pill head start forces investors to rethink Eli Lilly's GLP-1 dominance

items.title_en: Gap co‑founder Doris Fisher dies at 94

items.desc_en: Fisher and her late husband Donald Fisher opened the first Gap store in 1969 on Ocean Avenue in San Francisco. She coined the name "The Gap."

items.desc_zh: 希娜·古特尼克是第一个在调查这起袭击事件的皇家委员会提供证据的人。

items.desc_zh: 两场欧洲峰会正在一个长期被视为俄罗斯在该地区最亲密盟友的国家举行。

items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。

items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示美军将成为一支“人工智能优先”的战斗部队
items.desc_en: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
items.desc_zh: 美国军方在扩大人工智能能力的同时，已与大型科技公司签订了八份新合同。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）最新的特斯拉薪酬价值 1580 亿美元 - 但他无法将其装进口袋
items.desc_en: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克必须在特斯拉实现一系列雄心勃勃的里程碑，才能证明巨额薪酬的合理性——到目前为止，他还没有做到。

items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。
